title: After a Solid 2021, Can M&A & Its ETF Soar in 2022?
text: U.S. M&A activity totaled $2.5 trillion in 2021, breaching the 2015 peak. Though rising rate worries and a tumbling stock market are drags on the M&A activity in 2022, cash cushion and some emerging trends may buoy this corporate activity this year as well.

title: Dell (DELL) Launches Multi-Cloud Services, Expands Portfolio
text: Dell Technologies (DELL) launches Apex Data Storage Services to help organizations simplify operations across the multi-cloud.

title: Dell Technologies Speeds Journey to Multi-Cloud with Portfolio Expansion
text: ROUND ROCK, Texas, Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --                                                     News summary APEX Multi-Cloud Data Services delivers storage and data protection as-a-Service with simultaneous access to all major public clouds through a single console APEX Backup Services protects SaaS applications, endpoints and hybrid workloads in the public cloud Project Alpine will bring Dell's block and file storage software to leading public clouds, delivering flexibility and consistency in managing data between on-premises environments and public clouds DevOps-ready platforms and developer portal designed to accelerate modern application initiatives and improve developer and overall IT productivity Full story Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) introduces multi-cloud capabilities that offer a consistent experience wherever applications and data reside. The company also expands support for developer operations (DevOps) with new offers and resources to help choose the right cloud environment combined with the security, support and predictable cost of Dell infrastructure.

title: Tough Week for Tech Amid Economic Data, Rising Interest Rates
text: It was a volatile week on Wall Street, with tech in the spotlight throughout most of it.

title: 8 Outstanding Tech Hardware Stocks BofA Says to Buy Now
text: Shipments of personal computers and laptops totaled 341 million units last year, the highest total in a decade.

title: Weak Demand, Supply Issues Take a Toll on Q4 PC Shipments
text: Technology research firm, Gartner, reveals in its latest report that ongoing supply chain constraints and decline in demand for Chromebooks caused a 5% year-over-year decline in Q4 PC shipments.

title: The Ratings Game: Dell rises to record high after analyst calls stock ‘compellingly inexpensive'
text: Dell Technologies Inc. shares closed at a record high Monday after being dubbed “compellingly inexpensive” by an analyst.

title: Bernstein Upgrades Dell Technologies On Earnings Potential: What's Next?
text: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE:DELL) seems poised for sustainable revenue growth of 2% to 4% and earnings growth of mid-to-high single digits, both of which are higher than Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) and HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ), which trade similar multiples, according to Bernstein. The Dell Technologies Analyst: Toni Sacconaghi upgraded the rating for Dell Technologies from Market Perform to Outperform while raising the price target from $63 to $72.

title: Buy Some Dell Shares, Bernstein Says. Why They Turned Bullish on the PC Maker.
text: An analyst at the firm raised his price target on the stock, implying a more than 20% upside from recent prices.

title: Dell Stock Hits Record High After Bernstein Upgrade
text: Dell Technologies Inc (NYSE:DELL) is up 1.6% at $58.91 this morning, and earlier notched an all-time high of $59.70, following an upgrade from Bernstein to "outperform" from "market perform.

title: Dell Technologies to present at Bank of America's View from the Top CEO Series
text: ROUND ROCK, Texas, Jan. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) announces that chair and chief executive officer, Michael Dell, will be participating in a virtual fireside chat hosted by Wamsi Mohan of Bank of America on Tuesday, January 11, 2022 at 2:30 p.m. CT / 3:30 p.m.
